name: Study Planner
description: AI-powered study planning tool that connects to your Google account to create personalized study schedules, track progress, and set learning goals

tools.name: create_study_plan
tools.description: Create a personalized study plan for a subject with scheduled sessions, goals, and milestones

goal.description: The learning goal (e.g., 'Master fractions', 'Learn about the solar system')

duration_weeks.description: Number of weeks for the study plan (1-12)

tools.name: get_study_progress
tools.description: Get current study plan progress, completed sessions, and upcoming tasks
